sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3252" key="a)/knamptos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄκναμπτος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄκναπτος</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄκνᾰφος</orth>, <sense id="n3252.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἄγν-</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
